name: Stuck with the Worst People in the Woods
description:
After the bus leaves without you the only place you can stay is a run down cabin, but you are not the only one with this idea. 5 other classmates followed. Now, you're stuck with the worst people you know until help arrives, and that could take days.

︶ ⏝ ︶ ୨୧ ︶ ⏝ ︶ ⏝ ︶ ୨୧ ︶ ⏝ ︶

Cast of Characters:

︶ ⏝ ︶ ୨୧ ︶ ⏝ ︶ ⏝ ︶ ୨୧ ︶ ⏝ ︶

👾 Remember that all complaints about the bot talking for you, repeating itself, and forgetting or not sticking to the story is the problem of the AI. Furthermore, rude or grotesque comments will be deleted. 👾

If you have constructive criticism I would love to hear it! I am diagnosed dyslexic and practicing author so I could use the help!

Newest Bot update. All the art and char desc are back! Also, now all the characters are in college for you freaks out there. Enjoy <3 I plan to make more bots for these characters, so if you like them consider following me!
creator: Shumai09
